title: clerodendrum ternatum f. villosum
intro: Clerodendrum ternatum f. villosum, also known as the hairy glorybower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The hairy glorybower is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the Clerodendrum ternatum f. villosum plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
